rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for row type, description, and amounts. Visually confirmed as a clear year header with no associated monetary values.

Amounts are in full consensus and clearly visible. `gemini-flash`'s row type 'total' was chosen, as 'Brought over' semantically represents a running sum rather than an individual entry, aligning with best practice for ledger classification. `gemini-flash`'s note implicitly supports this interpretation.

Full consensus across extractors for description, type, and amounts. Visually confirmed as clearly written and aligned: £5 5s 0d. While `gpt-5-mini` noted minor ambiguity, visual inspection clarifies the reading.
rows.english_description: Payment to the bell ringer for his services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the bell ringer for his services, amounting to £5 5s 0d.

rows.description: Rowell's Stipend for care of the Clock to Midr. 1825
rows.notes: Amounts are in full consensus and clearly visible. The description text 'Midr.' (with superscript 'r' for Midsummer) is more accurately transcribed by `gemini-flash` and its note explaining the abbreviation is helpful. Confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Stipend paid to Rowell for care and maintenance of the college clock up to Midsummer 1825.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to Rowell for care and maintenance of the college clock to Midsummer 1825, amounting to £3 3s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in full consensus and clearly visible. The description 'University Marshall' (singular) is accurately transcribed by `gemini-flash` as confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the University Marshall, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Full consensus across extractors for description, type, and amounts. Visually confirmed as clearly written and aligned: £0 12s 0d, with the pounds column empty. `gpt-5-mini`'s note acknowledges faintness but the reading is unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Payment to the city watchman for his services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the city watchman, amounting to £0 12s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in full consensus and visually confirmed as £0 17s 0d, with the '1' of '17' clearly within the shillings column, despite `gpt-5-mini` noting potential ambiguity. The description 'Corn Prices' (plural) is accurate based on visual inspection, matching `gemini-flash`.
rows.english_description: Payment for corn (provision purchase) at the recorded price.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for corn (provision purchase), amounting to £0 17s 0d.

rows.description: Land Tax. for the Stable yard. One yr. Lady Day. 1825
rows.notes: Amounts are in full consensus and clearly visible. The description text is a synthesis, primarily drawing from `gemini-flash` but correcting 'Day.' to 'Lady Day.' based on careful visual inspection of the image, as neither extractor fully captured this abbreviation correctly.
rows.english_description: Land tax charged on the stable yard for one year from Lady Day 1825.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Land tax for the stable yard for one year (from Lady Day 1825), amounting to £1 7s 6d.

rows.description: Easter Offerings to St. Michael's Parish
rows.notes: Amounts are in full consensus and clearly visible. The description capitalization for 'Offerings' is taken from `gemini-flash` as confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Easter offerings paid to St Michael's parish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Easter offerings paid to St Michael's parish, amounting to £1 1s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in full consensus and clearly visible. The description 'at. 13.6.' is accurately transcribed by `gemini-flash` (dot, not colon, after 'at' and between '13' and '6'). `gpt-5-mini`'s note provides excellent contextual validation for the amount by calculating '17 at 13/6', which matches the extracted amount, showing strong verification for the monetary values.
rows.english_description: Payment of church and poor rates (aggregate assessment).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of church and poor rates (aggregate), amounting to £11 9s 6d.

rows.description: Arch Deacon's Procurations for K.dl. Rectory 2 yrs. 3
rows.notes: Amounts are in full consensus and clearly visible. The description text is a careful transcription based on visual override: 'K.dl. Rectory' is clear, followed by '2 yrs.' written below the main line and a marginal '3' further to the right, which are included as additional context.
rows.english_description: Archdeacon's procuration fees for the Kidlington rectory covering two years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Archdeacon's procuration fees for the Kidlington rectory for two years, amounting to £1 4s 0d.
